case_title: ESTHER R LERNER VS. AMANDA WALLTERS

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER ESTHER LERNER'S NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5759
PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE FILED BY PETITIONER LERNER, ESTHER R AS TO RESPONDENT WALLTERS, AMANDA SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF HEARING OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER LERNER, ESTHER R HEARING SET FOR FEB-26-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALLTERS, AMANDA

PROOF OF SERVICE OF PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT, OR VACATE ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE FILED BY PETITIONER LERNER, ESTHER R SERVED JAN-20-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO RESPONDENT WALLTERS, AMANDA
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-26-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LERNER, ESTHER R RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALLTERS, AMANDA $23,247.79 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,247.79, WITH THE LEGAL RATE OF INTEREST TO ACCRUE COMMENCING ON THE DATE THIS JUDGMENT IS SIGNED. SEE SCANNED DOC
